decks.notes: The deck is focused on quickly filling the graveyard and winning the game in a single explosive turn. It aims to use cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to rapidly dump the entire deck into the graveyard, then finish with a combo involving Thassa's Oracle or Reanimate to win the game. The deck is built around powerful mana acceleration cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to enable these quick, game-winning plays. The inclusion of Pact of Negation helps protect the combo from disruption, ensuring a swift victory.

The focus of this deck is to aggressively play low-cost creatures like Ornithopter and Mockingbird in order to quickly get out powerful Ninja creatures like Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow and Ingenious Infiltrator. The deck also includes disruption and control elements in the form of cards like Daze, Force of Will, and Fatal Push to ensure that the opponent has a hard time stopping the Ninjas' attacks. The mana base includes various fetch lands and dual lands to provide flexibility and consistency in casting spells. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with swift and deadly ninja attacks.

The main concept of this Mono Black Aggro Legacy deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient creatures while disrupting their game plan with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, while utilizing powerful creatures like Dauthi Voidwalker and Nethergoyf to apply constant pressure. The inclusion of cards like Moonshadow and Super Shredder allows for card advantage and consistency. Overall, the deck focuses on a proactive aggressive strategy combined with disruption to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent.

The main focus of this Legacy deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Painter's Servant and Grindstone to mill the opponent's entire library in one turn. The deck includes cards like Urza's Workshop, Grim Monolith, and Lotus Petal to ramp up mana quickly, along with cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain to assist in finding combo pieces. The deck also features artifact synergies like Manifold Key and Voltaic Key to maximize the efficiency of the combo. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while quickly assembling the win condition.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Cloudpost and other resources to play large, powerful Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog and Emrakul. It also utilizes cards like Planar Nexus and Karn, the Great Creator to control the board and disrupt opponents. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with massive threats and efficient ramping while also having ways to deal with opposing strategies and threats. It combines powerful ramping abilities with disruptive elements to ensure a strong and consistent game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to apply pressure to the opponent while disrupting their game plan through a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Barrowgoyf, Brazen Borrower, and Murktide Regent to apply pressure, along with spells like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and secure a victory. The inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Orcish Bowmasters also helps to further disrupt the opponent's mana base and game plan.

The deck is focused on quickly assembling a combo using cards like Agadeem's Awakening, Boggart Trawler, and Lotus Petal to cast a sequence of spells that ultimately allow the player to win the game by milling their entire library and casting Thassa's Oracle to win the game on the spot. The deck includes various ways to generate mana quickly and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress. The goal is to execute the combo as fast as possible before the opponent can stop it.

The deck focuses on the strategy of quickly putting powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. It also utilizes cards like Omniscience and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to generate additional value and control the game. The deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently and overwhelm the opponent with its high-cost, game-winning creatures. Supporting cards like Force of Will and Veil of Summer help protect the combo and keep the deck resilient against disruption from the opponent.

The main focus of this Dragon Stompy deck is to quickly lock down the opponent's mana base and disrupt their game plan with cards like Magus of the Moon, Blood Moon, and Chalice of the Void. By using powerful dragons like Hexing Squelcher and Broadside Bombardiers, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The deck also utilizes fast mana acceleration cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Chrome Mox to get ahead of the opponent early on. Sundering Eruption and Fury provide additional removal and board control to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing lands as a resource to control the game. The key strategy involves using cards like Dark Depths, Thespian's Stage, and Urza's Saga to create powerful land-based threats while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter. The deck also features ways to recur lands from the graveyard with cards like Life from the Loam and Crop Rotation, allowing for consistent mana development and resource denial. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Bojuka Bog and Karakas provides additional disruption and protection against graveyard and legendary threats.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana and artifacts to enable powerful artifact synergies and aggressive plays. It aims to disrupt the opponent with cards like Sink into Stupor and Force of Will while deploying threats like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Patchwork Automaton. Urza's Saga provides additional mana and artifact tokens to fuel the strategy, while cards like Chalice of the Void and Force of Negation help control the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently cheat powerful creatures into play from the graveyard, either through reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead or through playing creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand directly. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Unmask, Thoughtseize, and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining explosive graveyard strategies with disruption, this combo-reanimator deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and win the game quickly.

The deck revolves around using Aluren to cast creatures for free and combo off with cards like Omniscience and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. It also includes cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Formidable Speaker to help control the board and disrupt opponents, while utilizing cards like Ponder and Brainstorm for card selection and manipulation. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and spells, ultimately leading to a decisive victory.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a 20/20 Indestructible Marit Lage token, which can win the game in just one attack. The deck utilizes cards like Crop Rotation and Sylvan Scrying to search for the combo pieces, while also including disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Pithing Needle to protect the combo. Additionally, cards like Vampire Hexmage and Not of This World provide additional synergy and protection for the combo. The deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently through its powerful combo strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly getting out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn using the combination of Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience. The goal is to use these cards to cheat out big threats onto the battlefield, overwhelming the opponent and winning the game. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect its key combo pieces, as well as cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm to dig for the necessary cards. The mana base is optimized for fast and reliable mana generation to support the deck's explosive plays.

The deck focuses on quickly playing powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier by using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By using these combo pieces, the player can bypass traditional mana costs and overwhelm their opponent with high-powered creatures. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect their strategy and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to cheat out big threats early in the game and overrun the opponent before they have a chance to recover.
